note: Golden data from qrencode (libqrencode), byte mode (-8), no quiet zone. Each case records the mask qrencode chose, decoded from the symbol's own format bits, because mask selection is a heuristic on which conforming encoders legitimately differ. Pin that mask and the rest of the pipeline must agree module for module: version selection, ECC block splitting, Reed-Solomon, interleaving, module placement, format and version information.

matrices.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
